scores.correctness_notes: Covers all key elements: temp_model fixture, deploy, wait with all_active and all_agents_idle, any_error. Extra assertion on status.apps is reasonable additional detail.
scores.hallucination_notes: juju.wait_timeout = 10 * 60 set as instance attribute — gold standard describes timeout as a parameter to wait(), not an instance attribute; this may not exist and is a minor inaccuracy.
